name: Northern Graphite Corp.
description: Northern Graphite Corporation is a Canadian-based company and the only significant producer of natural graphite in North America. The company is focused on becoming a vertically integrated mine-to-market leader, supplying high-value graphite products for the green economy. With mining operations at the Lac des Iles mine in Quebec and development projects in Namibia and Ontario, Northern Graphite is actively expanding its capacity to provide essential battery anode materials for the electric vehicle market, while continuing to serve diverse industrial sectors including steel manufacturing, heat management, and automotive friction products.
